package.name: real_ur3e_description
package.description: Real-robot UR3e + Robotiq 85 combining xacro — the MoveIt Setup Assistant input source for real_moveit_config. A project-owned, stripped variant of Universal_Robots_ROS2_Description's ur_moveit.urdf.xacro: same arm+gripper instantiation (matches the real robot's actual TF chain, tool0 -> robotiq_85_base_link), with ground_plane_box (a sim floor prop) and the sensor_r430 wrist camera (a simulated RealSense at an arbitrary pose — the real camera is a D415, not URDF-attached, and separately bridged over Zenoh) removed.
